message:
🌱 Add longhorn: [IMPROVEMENT] Metrics for backups mission (#1975)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "longhorn-11387-improvement-metrics-for-backups",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "longhorn: [IMPROVEMENT] Metrics for backups",
+    "description": "[IMPROVEMENT] Metrics for backups. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current longhorn deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your longhorn version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn\nhelm list -n longhorn 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working longhorn installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review longhorn configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant longhorn configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn\nkubectl get configmap -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=longhorn\n```\n### Is your improvement request related to a feature? Please describe (👍 if you like this request)\n\nCollect the metrics of backups, record them in the CRs, and expose them on Longhorn manager."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [IMPROVEMENT] Metrics for backups",
+        "description": "Tested on master-head (longhorn-manager d75a8a1) by following [the test steps](https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn/issues/11387#issuecomment-3808966735).\n\n`longhorn_backup_target_backup_volume_count` can be found in the metrics:\n\n```\n# curl -s http://10.42.1.6:9500/metrics | grep\n```yaml\n# curl -s http://10.42.1.6:9500/metrics | grep longhorn_backup_target_backup_volume_count\n# HELP longhorn_backup_target_backup_volume_count Number of backup volumes on this backup target\n# TYPE longhorn_backup_target_backup_volume_count gauge\nlonghorn_backup_target_backup_volume_count{backup_target=\"default\"} 1\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn\nkubectl get events -n longhorn --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[IMPROVEMENT] Metrics for backups\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Tested on master-head (longhorn-manager d75a8a1) by following [the test steps](https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn/issues/11387#issuecomment-3808966735).",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# curl -s http://10.42.1.6:9500/metrics | grep longhorn_backup_target_backup_volume_count\n# HELP longhorn_backup_target_backup_volume_count Number of backup volumes on this backup target\n# TYPE longhorn_backup_target_backup_volume_count gauge\nlonghorn_backup_target_backup_volume_count{backup_target=\"default\"} 1",
+        "# curl -s http://10.42.1.6:9500/metrics | grep longhorn_backup_volume_backups_count\n# empty \n\n# curl -s http://10.42.1.6:9500/metrics | grep longhorn_backup_accumulated_physical_file_size_bytes\n# empty",
+        "$ kubectl exec -it longhorn-manager-ptclb -n longhorn-system -- /bin/sh\nsh-4.4# curl -s http://10.42.1.6:9500/metrics | grep longhorn_backup_target_backup_volume_count\n# HELP longhorn_backup_target_backup_volume_count Number of backup volumes on this backup target\n# TYPE longhorn_backup_target_backup_volume_count gauge\nlonghorn_backup_target_backup_volume_count{backup_target=\"default\"} 2\n\nsh-4.4# curl -s http://10.42.1.6:9500/metrics | grep longhorn_backup_volume_backups_count      \n# HELP longhorn_backup_volume_backups_count Number of backups belonging to this backup volume\n# TYPE longhorn_backup_volume_backups_count gauge\nlonghorn_backup_volume_backups_count{backup_volume=\"vol-2-280cc385\"} 1\nlonghorn_backup_volume_backups_count{backup_volume=\"vol-c4eb6c05\"} 1\n\nsh-4.4# curl -s http://10.4"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "longhorn",
+      "incubating",
+      "storage",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "longhorn"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn/issues/11387",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with longhorn installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-07T06:40:05.194Z",

+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
